title: "wireBridgeProtobuf()"
description: "D498 focused canonical protobuf byte adapter over an existing semantic wireBridge bundle. This helper owns no transport/session/retry policy and does not add wireBridge core options. Malformed bytes become graph-visible issue/invalid facts, never local protocol terminals."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

D498 focused canonical protobuf byte adapter over an existing semantic wireBridge bundle.

This helper owns no transport/session/retry policy and does not add wireBridge core options.
Malformed bytes become graph-visible issue/invalid facts, never local protocol terminals.

## Import

```ts
import { wireBridgeProtobuf } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Signature

```ts
function wireBridgeProtobuf(
	graph: Graph,
	bridge: WireBridgeBundle<WireBridgeProtobufData, WireBridgeProtobufData>,
	opts: WireBridgeProtobufOptions = {},
): WireBridgeProtobufBundle
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes or projector. |
| `bridge` | `WireBridgeBundle<WireBridgeProtobufData, WireBridgeProtobufData>` | bridge value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `WireBridgeProtobufOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `WireBridgeProtobufBundle` value.

## Example

```ts
import { wireBridgeProtobuf } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/adapters/bridge.ts`
